generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100System : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical system under study for MABI MAX 100 serial robot with six axes for machining tasks"
    base:contains MABIMAX100PermanentMagnetMotor, MABIMAX100GearTransmissionSystem, MABIMAX100SiemensController
]

instance MABIMAX100PermanentMagnetMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system comprising primary gear and cycloidal gear"
]

instance MABIMAX100SiemensController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for precise motion control"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for motor control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor shaft position data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle data after gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance CurrentDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time input current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for requirements and functional architecture"

]

]

    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis"

    base:desc "Gear transmission system comprising primary gear and cycloidal gear"

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture description languages (ADLs) such as ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs model component & connector perspectives for functional and logical architecture, including interfaces, interconnections, and composition. Behavioral aspects are described using MontiArc Automaton or SysML state machines. Methodologies like RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT handle complexity through abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical layers), requiring integration of heterogeneous tools and stakeholders for comprehensive MBSE descriptions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor time series data between physical and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], MontiArc [25, 26], and methodologies such as RFLP [18, 19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22]. These standards support interoperability and integration of heterogeneous models and tools (e.g., Simulink, C++, Java) while addressing diverse stakeholder perspectives [31]."
]
